title: Stars, Galaxies, and Black Holes
summary: Learn how stars live and die, how galaxies organize the cosmos, and why black holes are extreme results of gravity.

context.headline: From Starlight to Singularities
context.description: This module follows one big cosmic chain: gas clouds form stars, stars shape galaxies, and the most massive stars can end as black holes. You will build a mental model of stellar life cycles, galaxy structure, and what the event horizon really means.
context.when: From the first stars (~13.5 billion years ago) to today
